test.name: Extracts a marriage record and routes its 3:1: image ARK to image_read
test.description: A normal record-extraction task on an indexed marriage record that ALSO carries a page-scan image ARK. The skill should extract atomic assertions for both spouses (names, ages/inferred birth, birthplaces, parent relationships, the marriage event) from the indexed fields, AND — because the user asks to pull up the scan — fetch it by passing the 3:1: document-image ARK to image_read's `ark` parameter (bare 3:1: or canonical ark:/61903/3:1:...; image_read accepts either since #600). The routing guard is the original florencio bug: the skill must NOT put the ARK in `imageId` (imageId is only a bare NUMBER_NUMBER image id), declare the image unreachable, or convert the ARK to an imageId first. The harness mock returns image_read's response as JSON text, not a rendered scan, so transcription is out of scope — the skill extracts from the indexed fields it was given and the image call is graded only on routing.

input.user_message:
Extract the assertions from this FamilySearch marriage record into my project. It also links to a page scan at image ARK 3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG — pull that up too so I can compare it against what you extract.

Marriage Record — Brazil, Pernambuco, Civil Registration, 1804-2023
Record: ark:/61903/1:1:QLWC-Y1P7
Image: 3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG

Groom: Severino Ramos da Silva
Age: 26
Residence: Recife, Pernambuco, Brazil
Birthplace: Recife, Pernambuco, Brazil
Father: João Ramos da Silva
Mother: Maria da Conceição

Bride: Rivaneta Florencio de Araujo
Age: 21
Residence: Recife, Pernambuco, Brazil
Birthplace: Caruaru, Pernambuco, Brazil
Father: Miguel Florencio
Mother: Josefa de Araujo

Date of marriage: 22 August 1957
Place of marriage: Recife, Pernambuco, Brazil

judge_context: This is a valid record-extraction task. The skill should extract atomic assertions for BOTH spouses from the indexed record — names, ages (with birth-year inference where appropriate), birthplaces, the parent relationships (Severino's and Rivaneta's parents), and the marriage event (22 Aug 1957, Recife, Pernambuco, Brazil) — each properly sourced to this record. Grade the extraction on the usual atomicity / informant / evidence-type expectations.

The record also links to a page scan at image ARK 3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG, and the user asked to pull it up. The skill should fetch it by calling image_read with the `ark` parameter set to that 3:1: ARK. Passing the bare 3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG or the canonical ark:/61903/3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG form are BOTH correct — image_read accepts either since #600. It is INCORRECT to put the 3:1: ARK in the `imageId` parameter (imageId is only for a bare NUMBER_NUMBER image id, e.g. 004884748_02613), to declare the image unreachable, or to try to resolve/convert the ARK into an imageId before calling image_read.

Do NOT grade the visual content or transcription of the scan. The harness mock returns image_read's response as JSON text rather than a rendered image, so the agent cannot actually read the scan — it correctly extracts from the indexed fields provided in the message. The scan failing to render is expected and is NOT a failure; if the agent notes it couldn't display the image, that is fine. Grade only the extraction quality and that the ARK was routed to image_read's `ark` parameter.
